title: Better Look Enchant
description: A Minecraft Client-side mod on Fabric that clarify your enchantment level is maximum or not.
body:
# Better Look Enchant Better Look Enchant is a Minecraft Client-side mod that clarify your enchantment level is maximum or not. When an enchantment level is maximum, the text color changes. If you have [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), you can get the full customization feature. ![Image](https://www.kow08absty.com/nextcloud/index.php/s/N2JH5N6do8NQSWo/preview) ## Requires [Fabric loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) 0.15.0 or above. Available on Fabric. ## Features
When the enchantment level is maximum
Green highlights.

The enchantment is Mending
Gold highlights.

The enchantment is Infinity
Light Purple highlights.

When you installed ModMenu, you can change
The default color and style of enchantments.
The highlight color and style of maximum level.
Specified enchantment color and style if the level is maximum.
